title: Immunization, measles (% of children ages 12-23 months)
definition: Child immunization, measles, measures the percentage of children ages 12-23 months who received the measles vaccination before 12 months or at any time before the survey. A child is considered adequately immunized against measles after receiving one dose of vaccine.

source.license: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International unless specifically labeled otherwise by World Bank metadata
source.sourceOrganization:
World Health Organization (WHO), uri: http://www.who.int/immunization/monitoring_surveillance/en/;
UN Children's Fund (UNICEF), uri: https://data.unicef.org/topic/child-health/immunization/

editorial.shortHook: A vaccine-coverage map with conflict and health-capacity clues.
editorial.patternNote: The darkest countries include Uzbekistan, Turkmenistan, Qatar, while the lightest include Montenegro, Central African Republic, Yemen, Rep.; that contrast is the fastest way to read the measles immunization pattern.
editorial.whyItMatters: Measles immunization is a concrete signal of routine health-system reach.

bestProbeCountries.reason: High anchor: this country sits near the darkest end of the map.
Low anchor: this country clarifies the lightest end of the scale.
Middle check: this country helps separate a true pattern from one-off outliers.

commonConfusions.reason: Hepatitis B immunization can tempt players because it shares a strong country ranking with this map, but its unit and definition point to a different story.
DPT immunization can tempt players because it shares a strong country ranking with this map, but its unit and definition point to a different story.
UHC service coverage lives in the same category, so it can feel plausible until the high and low countries are checked.

editorial.difficultyReason: Standard difficulty: the map has readable regional structure, but the best answer still depends on checking the unit and country anchors.
regionalSignals: Health maps often separate income, public-health capacity, and conflict exposure.
Check both high-income and low-income anchors.

reviewNotes: Routine vaccine coverage is concrete and readable.
DPT can be a close Cartographer distractor but should not share an easy Daily with this map.
